## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss SEMrush Enterprise platform and AI SEO (AIO) features for potential upgrade of growthx.ai's existing SEMrush subscription.](https://fathom.video/share/yfULWPLUu2qbnfiezsH-kANzRChjA7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEMrush's AIO platform offers competitive AI SEO tracking and analysis capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/yfULWPLUu2qbnfiezsH-kANzRChjA7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [growthx.ai currently spends \~$5k/month on SEMrush with 50+ seats; considering upgrade to Enterprise + AIO](https://fathom.video/share/yfULWPLUu2qbnfiezsH-kANzRChjA7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=5000.0)
  - [Follow-up demo scheduled for Monday to dive deeper into Enterprise features and pricing for AIO](https://fathom.video/share/yfULWPLUu2qbnfiezsH-kANzRChjA7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)
  - [Potential for future co-marketing partnership between SEMrush and growthx.ai to be explored](https://fathom.video/share/yfULWPLUu2qbnfiezsH-kANzRChjA7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)

## Topics

### SEMrush AIO Platform Overview

  - [Tracks AI-generated content performance across multiple LLMs (e.g., ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini)](https://fathom.video/share/yfULWPLUu2qbnfiezsH-kANzRChjA7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
  - [Generates prompts based on keywords, monitors trending questions/topics](https://fathom.video/share/yfULWPLUu2qbnfiezsH-kANzRChjA7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Analyzes share of voice, sentiment, and concept trends over time](https://fathom.video/share/yfULWPLUu2qbnfiezsH-kANzRChjA7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [Provides source analysis to check for outdated information in AI responses](https://fathom.video/share/yfULWPLUu2qbnfiezsH-kANzRChjA7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
  - [Offers market analysis and competitive benchmarking features](https://fathom.video/share/yfULWPLUu2qbnfiezsH-kANzRChjA7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)

### Current SEMrush Usage by growthx.ai

  - [Spending approximately $5,000/month on SEMrush](https://fathom.video/share/yfULWPLUu2qbnfiezsH-kANzRChjA7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=5000.0)
  - [Have 50+ seats on the Business plan ($100/seat)](https://fathom.video/share/yfULWPLUu2qbnfiezsH-kANzRChjA7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)
  - [Includes 40 projects, with additional projects at $10/month each](https://fathom.video/share/yfULWPLUu2qbnfiezsH-kANzRChjA7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=2153.0)

### AIO Pricing and Structure

  - [Pricing model still being finalized (per project vs. per prompt)](https://fathom.video/share/yfULWPLUu2qbnfiezsH-kANzRChjA7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=1653.0)
  - [growthx.ai estimates needing \~50 domains/projects and potentially 5,000 prompts](https://fathom.video/share/yfULWPLUu2qbnfiezsH-kANzRChjA7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=2280.0)
  - [SEMrush to provide more detailed pricing information in follow-up meeting](https://fathom.video/share/yfULWPLUu2qbnfiezsH-kANzRChjA7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=1653.0)

### Competitive Landscape

  - [growthx.ai currently evaluating Scrunch and Profound as alternatives](https://fathom.video/share/yfULWPLUu2qbnfiezsH-kANzRChjA7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=1303.0)
  - [SEMrush positioning as a more comprehensive, integrated solution](https://fathom.video/share/yfULWPLUu2qbnfiezsH-kANzRChjA7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=1283.0)
  - [Discussion on differences in geographic coverage and data sources](https://fathom.video/share/yfULWPLUu2qbnfiezsH-kANzRChjA7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)

### Enterprise Platform Benefits

  - [Integrates core SEMrush features with advanced AIO capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/yfULWPLUu2qbnfiezsH-kANzRChjA7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=1283.0)
  - [Potential for more efficient workflow and consolidated toolset for growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/yfULWPLUu2qbnfiezsH-kANzRChjA7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=1283.0)

### Co-marketing Opportunities

  - [Initial interest from growthx.ai in potential partnership](https://fathom.video/share/yfULWPLUu2qbnfiezsH-kANzRChjA7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)
  - [SEMrush to explore internally, noting company size and public status considerations](https://fathom.video/share/yfULWPLUu2qbnfiezsH-kANzRChjA7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=1936.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Follow-up meeting scheduled for Monday at 9:30 AM PT / 12:30 PM ET](https://fathom.video/share/yfULWPLUu2qbnfiezsH-kANzRChjA7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=1700.0)
  - [SEMrush to prepare detailed Enterprise demo and AIO pricing information](https://fathom.video/share/yfULWPLUu2qbnfiezsH-kANzRChjA7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)
  - [Include Kirkland (growthx.ai engineer) in the next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/yfULWPLUu2qbnfiezsH-kANzRChjA7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=1728.0)
  - [SEMrush to internally discuss potential co-marketing opportunities with growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/yfULWPLUu2qbnfiezsH-kANzRChjA7jY?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)
